docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HONDA OF OAKLAND MEDIATED SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
